programme.title: Wes & Raf
programme.desc: In aflevering 3 van Wes & Raf blikken Wesley Sneijder en Rafael van der Vaart samen met Noa Vahle terug op hun gezamenlijke jaren in het Nederlands elftal. Van onvergetelijke hoogtepunten op eindtoernooien tot de teleurstellingen die Oranje ook kende: alles komt voorbij. Hoe bijzonder is het om het Oranje-shirt te dragen en je land te vertegenwoordigen op het hoogste podium? En hoe kon het dat Oranje na het magische WK van 2010 twee jaar later zo teleurstellend presteerde op het EK van 2012?

programme.title: Het finale duel: Ronaldo vs Messi
programme.desc: In deze documentaire de twee genieën die voorbestemd waren om een tijdperk te bepalen, botsten op hetzelfde podium. Deze documentaire onderzoekt de oorsprong van de rivaliteit tussen Cristiano Ronaldo en Lionel Messi, het moment waarop hun confrontatie het Spaanse voetbal veranderde en grootsheid in het moderne voetbal voorgoed herdefinieerde.

programme.desc: In een nieuwe aflevering van Kick 't Met On Tour: de Coppa Italia! Armin en Jefferson bezoeken in het iconische Stadio Olimpico de bekerfinale tussen Lazio en Inter. Eenmaal daar waren de heren onder de indruk van de sfeer en wie ze wel niet allemaal tegen kwamen. programme.title: Frank Slotta maakt kennis met rugby: Schotland - Frankrijk in de Six Nations
programme.desc: Frank Slotta had nog nooit een rugbywedstrijd gezien: hoog tijd dus voor Jay-Jay Boske om hem mee te nemen! En niet zomaar een wedstrijd: in Schotland strijdt het thuisland tegen titelverdediger Frankrijk in de Six Nations. Wint Schotland? Dan ligt alles open voor de laatste speelronde, met nog 3 titelkandidaten. Wint Frankrijk? Dan kan het de titel prolongeren… Slotta laat zich onderdompelen in alles wat rugby zo'n mooie, unieke sport maakt.

programme.title: Jorge Martin: From Heaven to Hell
programme.desc: De uitdrukking 'Jorge Martin: Van de hemel naar de hel' verwijst naar twee verschillende, contrasterende periodes voor de coureur. Letterlijker kan het verwijzen naar een dramatische verschuiving in zijn carrière: zijn hemel was het winnen van het MotoGP-kampioenschap van 2024, terwijl zijn hel een blessure werd die hem dwong de laatste races van het seizoen 2025, die hij met nummer 1 zou hebben gereden, te missen.

programme.title: Hall of Fame dinner
programme.desc: Voor het eerst schuiven zeven MotoGP Hall of Fame-leden samen aan tafel. Giacomo Agostini, Valentino Rossi, Jorge Lorenzo, Casey Stoner, Freddie Spencer, Kevin Schwantz en Dani Pedrosa, samen goed voor 23 wereldtitels in de koningsklasse, komen samen voor een besloten diner met enkele van de grootste namen uit de geschiedenis van de sport. En wanneer deze iconen beginnen te praten, is dat goud waard.

programme.title: Jorge Martin: From Heaven to Hell
programme.desc: De uitdrukking 'Jorge Martin: Van de hemel naar de hel' verwijst naar twee verschillende, contrasterende periodes voor de coureur. Letterlijker kan het verwijzen naar een dramatische verschuiving in zijn carrière: zijn hemel was het winnen van het MotoGP-kampioenschap van 2024, terwijl zijn hel een blessure werd die hem dwong de laatste races van het seizoen 2025, die hij met nummer 1 zou hebben gereden, te missen.

programme.title: I sentimenti cambiano tutto
programme.desc: S1 Ep3 I sentimenti cambiano tutto - Tra storie d'amore in divenire e false piste, il percorso di un concorrente giunge al termine. Due nuovi concorrenti a sorpresa stravolgono immediatamente il gioco.

programme.title: Che l'inganno abbia inizio
programme.desc: S1 Ep4 Che l'inganno abbia inizio - I nuovi arrivati Peter e Jana non perdono tempo e scatenano subito un po' di trambusto. Dopo essere stato votato come il piu' affidabile, Biggy si trova di fronte a un bivio: tradire un membro dell'alleanza o rischiare lui stesso l'eliminazione.

programme.title: Siracusa: tra Storia e Mare
programme.desc: S3 Ep2 Siracusa: Tra storia e mare - Angelo e Antonella vivono nell'entroterra siciliano, e desiderano acquistare una seconda casa a Siracusa. La sfida di oggi si gioca nel cuore antico della citta', l'isola di Ortigia.

programme.title: Na Pizza S.3 Ep.05
programme.desc: S3 Ep5 Na Pizza S.3 Ep.05 - In questa puntata Renato Bosco ospitera' Ciro Tutino, pizzaiolo napoletano da ben cinque generazioni.

programme.title: Ep.06
programme.desc: S8 Ep6 - Protagoniste di puntata sono quattro spose che per il gran giorno hanno scelto location orgogliosamente sul mare. E chissa'...ci sara' il bagno di mezzanotte?

programme.title: Case
programme.desc: S1 Ep3 Case - Shawn, agente immobiliare di Los Angeles, e' alla ricerca di una casa per un miliardario. Inoltre, incontriamo Freedom che sta rinnovando il suo appartamento a Beverly Hills.

programme.title: I sentimenti cambiano tutto
programme.desc: S1 Ep3 I sentimenti cambiano tutto - Tra storie d'amore in divenire e false piste, il percorso di un concorrente giunge al termine. Due nuovi concorrenti a sorpresa stravolgono immediatamente il gioco.

programme.title: Che l'inganno abbia inizio

programme.title: Lisbona
programme.desc: S9 Ep8 Lisbona - Intensa e seducente, e' un concentrato di storia, arte, vita popolare e naturalmente ottima cucina. Nella capitale portoghese non mancano i ristoranti di cucina italiana!

programme.title: Ravenna

School of Golf
programme.desc: The School of Golf offers tips and tricks on how to improve your golfing game. Here, obtain the knowledge to escape safely from the bunker. Ep 4.

programme.title: Scottish Open 2016 Highlights
programme.desc: The final day at the Aberdeen Asset Management Scottish Open from Castle Stuart Golf Links. Alex Noren continues his good form coming into today, leading by two strokes on 12 under.

programme.title: The Open Films: Faldo 1987
programme.desc: A look back over some of the best contests at The Open in years gone by. This episode focuses on the 1987 tournament held at Muirfield, which saw a tight field compete for victory.

programme.title: Evian Championship Highlights
programme.desc: The opening day of the 2026 Amundi Evian Championship at Evian Resort Golf Club in France. Grace Kim earned her first Major title here a year ago. (09.07)

programme.title: Golf Academy
programme.desc: Professional golfers give advice on how to improve your game from the tee to the green. Here, Tony Jacklin explains the importance of executing a full swing.

programme.title: Golf Academy: McDowell Full Swing
programme.desc: Professional golfers give advice on how to improve your game across all aspects, from the tee to the green. Here, Graeme McDowell talks through the full swing.

programme.title: Rose Ladies Series Golf
programme.desc: Comprising five one-day warm-up tournaments across England for stars of the LET, the 2026 edition of the Rose Ladies Series concluded at North Hants Golf Club.

programme.title: HotelPlanner Tour Golf Highlights
programme.desc: Highlights from the Le Vaudreuil Golf Challenge during the 2026 season of the HotelPlanner Tour, the second tier of men's professional golf in Europe.

programme.title: Chronicles Of A Champion Golfer Rory McIlroy
programme.desc: A look at one of The Open's champions, Rory McIlroy. From Northern Ireland, McIlroy dreamed of winning The Open, a feat he achieved in 2014 with victory at Royal Liverpool.

programme.title: Evian Championship Highlights
programme.desc: The opening day of the 2026 Amundi Evian Championship at Evian Resort Golf Club in France. Grace Kim earned her first Major title here a year ago. (09.07)

programme.title: Live DP World Tour Golf
programme.desc: Round two of the Genesis Scottish Open. Rory McIlroy forms part of a five-way tie for the lead at the Renaissance Club, including former champion Bernd Wiesberger and Patrick Cantlay.

programme.title: Golf's Greatest Holes: Scotland
programme.desc: Starting out at Trump Turnberry, Chris goes on to join Paul McGinley at Muirfield and then Prestwick Golf Club - where Colin Montgomerie discusses the history of The Open. (3 of 6)

programme.title: Golf's Greatest Holes: Scotland
programme.desc: With trips to Glen Golf Club and the Cabot Highlands first, Chris then heads to Dumbarnie Links, Western Gailes and finally Trump Turnberry Golf Club with Colin Montgomerie.

programme.title: Evian Championship Highlights
programme.desc: The second day of the Amundi Evian Championship at Evian Resort Golf Club in France. Grace Kim earned her first Major title here a year ago. (10.07)

programme.title: Live PGA Tour Golf
programme.desc: Day two of the PGA Tour's ISCO Championship, taking place at Hurstbourne Country Club in Louisville, Kentucky. Thursday's first-round lead was shared by four at the summit.

programme.title: School of Golf
programme.desc: The School of Golf offers tips and tricks on how to improve your golfing game. Here, discover some of the game's best-kept short game secrets. Ep 2.

programme.title: The Open Films: Ballesteros 1988
programme.desc: A look back at some of the best contests at The Open in years gone by. Here, The 1988 Open at Royal Lytham & St Annes Golf Club, as heavy rain saw the first Monday finish in Open history.

programme.title: The Open Films: Calcavecchia 1989
programme.desc: A look back at some of the best contests at The Open in years gone by. Here, The 1989 Open at Royal Troon Golf Club, where an American golfer would seize his first - and only - Major.

programme.title: Evian Championship Highlights
programme.desc: The second day of the Amundi Evian Championship at Evian Resort Golf Club in France. Grace Kim earned her first Major title here a year ago. (10.07)

programme.title: Golf Academy: Sorenstam Short Game
programme.desc: Professional golfers give advice on how to improve your game from the tee to the green. Here, golf star Annika Sörenstam demonstrates the short game.

programme.title: Premier League Review
programme.desc: A look back at the weekend's action in the Premier League, featuring all of the goals, news and major talking points from around the top flight.

programme.title: PL: Burnley v Newcastle Hlts
programme.desc: Beaten on Boxing Day, Newcastle stay on the road for a trip to Scott Parker's Burnley, who remain in the bottom three - six points adrift from Premier League safety. (30.12)

programme.title: PL: Chelsea v Bournemouth Hlts
programme.desc: A Bournemouth side in freefall arrive at Stamford Bridge for a Premier League contest with an up-and-down Chelsea, who have only posted one win in their last five. (30.12)

programme.title: PL: Nott'm Forest v Everton Hlts
programme.desc: Forest and Everton meet for the second time this December. At the start of the month, Everton were resounding winners, putting three unanswered goals past Sean Dyche's Forest. (30.12)

programme.title: PL: West Ham v Brighton Hlts
programme.desc: The pressure is on for West Ham in this pivotal Premier League clash with Brighton to close out the year. The Hammers are 18th, now without a win in seven after defeat to Fulham. (30.12)

programme.title: PL: Arsenal v Aston Villa Hlts
programme.desc: On a big night at the Emirates, league leaders Arsenal host an Aston Villa side on an 11-game winning run, the seventh of which coming against the Gunners earlier this month. (30.12)

programme.title: PL: Man Utd v Wolves Hlts
programme.desc: Manchester United face Rob Edwards' winless Wolves in the Premier League. United are searching for back-to-back to wins at Old Trafford after beating Newcastle here on Boxing Day. (30.12)

programme.title: PL: Liverpool v Leeds Hlts
programme.desc: The champions remain at Anfield after beating Wolves 2-1 here as Leeds come next for Liverpool. With ex-Evertonian Dominic Calvert-Lewin in the goals, Leeds are five games unbeaten. (01.01)

programme.title: PL: Crystal Palace v Fulham Hlts
programme.desc: Three wins on the spin and Fulham are breathing down the necks of their London rivals Crystal Palace here, who tasted a third consecutive loss in the Premier League on Sunday. (01.01)

programme.title: PL: Brentford v Spurs Hlts
programme.desc: Bouncing back from consecutive Premier League defeats, another stern test awaits Spurs as Thomas Frank returns to the Gtech Community Stadium to face former side Brentford. (01.01)

programme.title: PL: Sunderland v Man City Hlts
programme.desc: Manchester City's title bid meets a Sunderland-shaped obstacle as Regis Le Bris' impressive Black Cats take on Pep Guardiola's serial Premier League winners at the Stadium of Light. (01.01)

programme.title: PL: Aston Villa v N. Forest Hlts
programme.desc: A chance for Villa to bounce back after a midweek drubbing at the Emirates as Unai Emery's side welcome 17th-placed Forest, who are aiming to avoid a fourth consecutive defeat. (03.01)

programme.title: PL: Brighton v Burnley Hlts
programme.desc: Brighton play host to Burnley at the Amex Stadium in the Premier League. (03.01)

programme.title: PL: Wolves v West Ham Hlts
programme.desc: Wolves play host to West Ham at Molineux in the Premier League. (03.01)

programme.title: SNF: Bournemouth v Arsenal Hlts
programme.desc: On Saturday Night Football, league leaders Arsenal - who ran riot in a 4-1 demolition midweek - begin 2026 at the Vitality, facing a Bournemouth side on a 10-game winless run. (03.01)

programme.title: PL: Spurs v Sunderland Hlts
programme.desc: It's Sunderland at home for Thomas Frank's Spurs after their first goalless draw in 137 Premier League games. The Black Cats held Manchester City to a draw in the week. (04.01)

programme.title: PL: Everton v Brentford Hlts
programme.desc: Coming away 2-0 winners from the City Ground, Everton are back at the Hill Dickinson Stadium for a Premier League encounter with Keith Andrews' in-form Brentford. (04.01)

programme.title: PL: Fulham v Liverpool Hlts
programme.desc: Unbeaten in four, Marco Silva's impressive Fulham provide another test for the champions Liverpool, who come from a goalless draw - the first of Arne Slot's Anfield tenure. (04.01)

programme.title: PL: Newcastle v C. Palace Hlts
programme.desc: Stemming the flow of three consecutive losses at home to Fulham, Palace go to Tyneside next to play Newcastle. The Magpies ended 2025 with a 3-1 win on the road to Burnley. (04.01)

programme.title: PL: Man City v Chelsea Hlts
programme.desc: Falling behind leaders Arsenal, what can Manchester City do in reply on Super Sunday against a Chelsea side coming to grips with the midweek dismissal of manager Enzo Maresca? (04.01)

programme.title: PL Stories: Pochettino's Spurs
programme.desc: Ahead of the World Cup, revisit the rise of current USA manager Mauricio Pochettino's Tottenham; the team that transformed Spurs from top-four hopefuls into genuine challengers.
